heading: United States-India scientific cooperative nuclear nonproliferation program
label: 8007 United States-India scientific cooperative nuclear nonproliferation program

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary of Energy, acting through the Administrator of the National Nuclear Security Administration, is authorized to establish a cooperative nuclear nonproliferation program to pursue jointly with scientists from the United States and India a program to further common nuclear nonproliferation goals, including scientific research and development efforts, with an emphasis on nuclear safeguards (in this section referred to as “the program”).

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: b Consultation
children.text: The program shall be carried out in consultation with the Secretary of State and the Secretary of Defense.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of Energy shall enter into an agreement with the National Academies to develop recommendations for the implementation of the program.

children.label: A
children.text: recommendations for research and related programs designed to overcome existing technological barriers to nuclear nonproliferation; and

children.label: B
children.text: an assessment of whether activities and programs funded under this section are achieving the goals of the activities and programs.

children.heading: Public availability
children.label: 3 Public availability
children.text: The recommendations and assessments prepared under this subsection shall be made publicly available.

children.heading: Consistency with Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty
children.label: d Consistency with Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty
children.text: All United States activities related to the program shall be consistent with United States obligations under the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section for each of fiscal years 2007 through 2011.
